name: Ammo Scavenger
descText: Any time you secure or deny a Soul from an entity you get ammo back and gain stacking Spirit Power . At Max Stacks, gain bonus Sprint speed

name: Close Quarters
descText: Deal additional Weapon Damage when in close range to your target.

name: Golden Goose Egg
descText: Gain souls over time , as long as you are alive.

name: Grit
descText: Gain a Barrier for a short duration.

name: Headshot Booster
descText: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals bonus weapon damage .

name: Healing Rite
descText: Grant Regen and Sprint Speed to the target. Gets dispelled if you take damage from enemy players or objectives. Can be self-cast.

name: Melee Lifesteal
descText: Your next Melee attack heals you . This heal is 30% effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

name: Mystic Burst
descText: Charges up over time with bonus spirit damage , causing abilities dealing more than 80 damage to deal additional damage.

name: Mystic Expansion
descText: Imbue an ability to increase its range and effect radius .

name: Mystic Regeneration
descText: Dealing spirit damage to enemy Heroes grants you Bonus regeneration . Stacks when dealing damage to different heroes.

name: Patron's Healing
descText: When you receive a Boon , automatically heal .

name: Rebuttal
descText: On a successful Parry against an enemy Hero, Heal yourself for the damage parried and returns that damage to the target, and temporarily gain increased damage.

name: Restorative Shot
descText: Your next bullet will heal you based on what target you hit.

name: Rusted Barrel
descText: Target an enemy to reduce their Fire Rate and Bullet Resistance .

name: Spirit Strike
descText: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, deal extra spirit damage with the attack and reduce the target's Spirit Resist . Cooldown is 2x longer for Light Melee hits.

name: Active Reload
descText: While reloading, pressing Reload during the highlighted portion will instantly finish your reload and grant you Fire Rate , Bullet Lifesteal and Move Speed .

name: Arcane Surge
descText: After you Dash-Jump , the next ability you use within 7s will have bonus Range, Duration, and Spirit Power .

name: Battle Vest
descText: While you are above 65% health , gain weapon damage and bonus fire rate .

name: Bullet Resist Shredder
descText: Reduces Bullet Resist on enemies when you deal spirit damage .

name: Cold Front
descText: Release an expanding ice blast that deals spirit damage and Slows targets it hits.

name: Compress Cooldown
descText: Imbue an ability to reduce its Cooldown .

name: Debuff Reducer
descText: Reduces the duration of all negative effects applied to you.

name: Duration Extender
descText: Imbue an ability to increase its Duration .

name: Enchanter's Emblem
descText: While you are above 65% health , gain bonus Spirit and Cooldown Reduction .

name: Enduring Speed
descText: Reduces the effect of enemy Move Speed penalties.

name: Guardian Ward
descText: Provide the target with a Barrier and temporary Move Speed . Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

name: Healbane
descText: Your spirit damage applies Healing Reduction . If an enemy hero dies under this effect, you receive a large heal.

name: Healing Booster
descText: Increases the effectiveness of your healing .

name: Intensifying Magazine
descText: Increases Weapon Damage as you continuously fire your weapon.

name: Kinetic Dash
descText: When you Dash-Jump you gain Fire Rate and bonus Ammo until your next reload. Lasts up to 7s.

name: Long Range
descText: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

name: Melee Charge
descText: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage .

name: Mystic Shot
descText: Your next bullet deals bonus spirit damage .

name: Mystic Slow
descText: When the target takes spirit damage , they have their Move Speed reduced.

name: Mystic Vulnerability
descText: When an enemy takes spirit damage , they have their spirit resist reduced.

name: Opening Rounds
descText: Your attacks have additional Weapon Damage against enemies above 50% health .

name: Quicksilver Reload
descText: Your imbued ability charges up over time with bonus spirit damage , bonus fire rate , and reloads bullets on use.

name: Reactive Barrier
descText: Gain a Barrier when you are Stunned, Chained, Immobilized, Slept or Silenced .

name: Recharging Rush
descText: Dealing significant weapon damage replenishes a charge for each of your charged abilities .

name: Return Fire
descText: Automatically fire a bullet towards any attacker who damages you with their abilities or weapon.

name: Slowing Bullets
descText: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

name: Slowing Hex
descText: Slows movement of enemy target. Also Silences their movement-based items and abilities . Increases the target's gravity. Does not affect target's stamina usage.

name: Spirit Sap
descText: Target an enemy to reduce their Spirit Resist and Spirit Power .

name: Spirit Shielding
descText: Gain a Barrier whenever you take significant spirit damage from enemy Heroes in a small time frame.

name: Spirit Shredder Bullets
descText: Your bullets apply a debuff that reduces the Spirit Resist of the target and grants you and your allies Spirit Lifesteal against them.

name: Split Shot
descText: Make your weapon fire multishot . Hitting more than one Hero per attack will grant a stacking weapon damage bonus . Targets can only be hit once per multishot.

name: Stalker
descText: Dealing weapon damage at close range opens a wound and grants you bonus move speed . Wounded enemies take spirit damage over time , have reduced bullet resist , and are revealed through walls .

name: Suppressor
descText: When you deal spirit damage to enemies, you also reduce their Fire Rate .

name: Trophy Collector
descText: Whenever you score an assist or kill , gain extra sprint , ability range and passive soul generation . This effect stacks and persists through death.

name: Weakening Headshot
descText: Landing a Headshot reduces their Bullet Resist .

name: Weapon Shielding
descText: Gain a Barrier whenever you take significant weapon damage from enemy Heroes in a small time frame.

name: Alchemical Fire
descText: Throw a flask that explodes on contact, creating an area that does increasing spirit damage per second and reduces enemy Bullet Resist . 50% less effective vs non-heroes.

name: Ballistic Enchantment
descText: Imbue an ability with increased range . Dealing damage with that ability grants you increased weapon damage per unique hero hit . Has reduced effect on non-heroes.

name: Berserker
descText: Your Weapon Damage increases as you take sustained damage.

name: Blood Tribute
descText: Toggle: Continually sacrifice Health to improve fire rate , Debuff Resistance and Move Speed .

name: Bullet Resilience
descText: When below 50% health , gain additional Bullet Resist .

name: Burst Fire
descText: Briefly gain Fire Rate and Move Speed when one of your bullets hits an enemy hero.

name: Counterspell
descText: Your next parry protects you from the damage and effects of enemy abilities and items . On a successful spell parry heal and gain move speed and Spirit .

name: Cultist Sacrifice
descText: Target an enemy NPC and consume it for 180% Bonus Souls and grants a powerful long lasting buff.

name: Decay
descText: Inflict damage over time to a target, dealing damage based on their current health. Decay's damage is non-lethal and does not apply item procs.

name: Disarming Hex
descText: Disarms enemy target and reduces their Bullet Resist .

name: Escalating Resilience
descText: Grants Bullet Resist when your bullets hit an enemy hero. Each shot can only grant one stack.

name: Express Shot
descText: Your next attack will fire twice in quick succession with increased damage and velocity. This attack consumes extra ammo.

name: Fortitude
descText: After not taking damage for a period, gain health regen.

name: Greater Expansion
descText: Increases the range and effect radius of your abilities and items.

name: Headhunter
descText: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals bonus weapon damage , heal you, and briefly grants bonus move speed .

name: Healing Nova
descText: Heal yourself and nearby allies.

name: Heroic Aura
descText: Provides Bullet Resist to nearby friendly units.

name: Hex-Sealed Knuckles
descText: After dealing an accumulated 200 spirit damage, your next Heavy Melee Attack deals an additional 200 spirit damage .

name: Hexafoil Ward
descText: Block the next spirit damage or Debuff , preventing its effects. Only regenerates outside of combat.

name: Hollow Point
descText: When you are above 65% health , deal additional Weapon Damage and your bullets reduce enemy Bullet Resist .

name: Hunter's Aura
descText: Reduces nearby enemies' Bullet Resist and Fire Rate . If there is only one enemy hero nearby, this effect is doubled .

name: Knockdown
descText: Apply a Stun after 2s . Stun duration is increased against airborne targets. Increases the target's gravity for the duration of the stun.

name: Lifestrike
descText: Your Melee Attack applies Movement Slow and heals you for a percentage of the Melee Damage dealt plus a fixed amount. This heal is 40% effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

name: Majestic Leap
descText: Launch yourself high into the air and grant yourself a Barrier . While in the air, you can use the active again to drop down faster. Cannot be used for 5s if attacked by enemy Hero.

name: Metal Skin
descText: Become immune to bullets .

name: Point Blank
descText: When in close range to your target, gain Weapon Damage and your bullets apply a Movement Slow .

name: Radiant Regeneration
descText: Heal and gain bonus Movement Speed for a short duration when you cast an ability.

name: Rebirth
descText: Respawns the hero at the spot they died.

name: Rescue Beam
descText: Heals a target allied hero and yourself for a percentage of Max Health . Once while healing, you can Pull the target towards you. Can be self-cast.

name: Shadow Weave
descText: Become Stealthed . Whenever you take damage while Stealthed you get briefly revealed.

name: Sharpshooter
descText: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

name: Silence Wave
descText: Launch an expanding projectile which Silences enemies for a short duration and deals impact damage. Silence does not interrupt channeling abilities.

name: Soul Explosion
descText: Kills or assists cause an explosion where the victim dies. Kills against heroes have greater radius and damage.

name: Spirit Resilience
descText: When below 50% health , gain additional Spirit Resist.

name: Spirit Snatch
descText: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, the attack deals extra spirit damage and steals Spirit Resist and Spirit Power . Effects are reduced by 30% for Light Melee hits.

name: Superior Cooldown
descText: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities.

name: Superior Duration
descText: Increases the duration of your abilities and items.

name: Surge of Power
descText: Imbue an ability with permanent Spirit Power . When that ability is used, gain bonus Move Speed and maintain full speed while attacking.

name: Tankbuster
descText: Charges up over time with bonus spirit damage , causing abilities dealing more than 165 damage to deal additional damage. Ignores Spirit Resistance.

name: Tesla Bullets
descText: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.

name: Torment Pulse
descText: Periodically deals spirit damage to the closest two enemies nearby.

name: Toxic Bullets
descText: Your bullets build up a Bleed on enemies, causing them to lose a percentage of their Max Health over time. Also applies Healing Reduction on the bleeding target.

name: Veil Walker
descText: Walking through a cosmic veil grants you Stealth , Heal and increased Move Speed .

name: Warp Stone
descText: Teleport straight ahead, gaining Bullet Resist .

name: Weighted Shots
descText: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

name: Arctic Blast
descText: Release an expanding ice blast that deals spirit damage , Freezing and then Slowing targets it hits. Slowed targets have their stamina regen frozen

name: Armor Piercing Rounds
descText: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance .

name: Capacitor
descText: Launch a projectile that deals damage , applies a strong slow that recovers over time, prevents Stamina usage and Silences their movement-based items and abilities .

name: Colossus
descText: Grow larger in size , gaining bullet resist , spirit resist , and melee damage . Nearby enemies suffer from slow and have reduced dash speed .

name: Crippling Headshot
descText: Landing a Headshot will reduce their Bullet and Spirit Resist and applies Healing Reduction .

name: Crushing Fists
descText: Your melee damage will restore ammo and apply a stacking bullet resist debuff on enemies. Heavy melee applies 2 stacks. If the target reaches max stacks, they will be stunned .

name: Cursed Relic
descText: Curses an enemy - interrupting, Silencing, Disarming , and preventing item usage . Removes all non-ultimate buffs .

name: Divine Barrier
descText: Remove all non-stun debuffs from the target and provide them with a Barrier and Move Speed . Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

name: Diviner's Kevlar
descText: Upon casting an ultimate ability gain a Barrier and temporary Spirit Power .

name: Endless Magazine
descText: Gain infinite ammo and bonus fire rate .

name: Escalating Exposure
descText: Dealing spirit damage applies a stacking Spirit Amp that increases your spirit damage to the target.

name: Ethereal Shift
descText: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which you float slowly and cannot perform actions. Afterwards you gain Spirit Power, Move Speed, and Spirit Resist . Can be canceled early. Activation cancels any active ability.

name: Focus Lens
descText: Target an enemy to Silence them. A portion of all damage dealt during the silence gets applied to the target when the silence wears off.

name: Glass Cannon
descText: Each hero kill grants permanent Fire Rate (up to a max of 8 times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

name: Glass Cannon v2
descText: Each hero kill grants permanent Weapon Damage (up to a max of 0 times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

name: Healing Tempo
descText: Applying heal to yourself or an ally grants the target bonus fire rate and bonus move speed . Does not apply on innate Regen or passive Bullet/Spirit Lifesteals.

name: Infuser
descText: Gain Spirit Lifesteal and Spirit Power .

name: Inhibitor
descText: Your bullets build up to reduce the target's outgoing damage and apply healing reduction .

name: Leech
descText: Reduces the effect of enemy applied healing reduction .

name: Lightning Scroll
descText: Damage from your ultimate applies a stun and deals bonus spirit damage after a short delay.

name: Lucky Shot
descText: Your bullets have a chance to be empowered, causing them to deal bonus weapon damage on hit. Bonus damage cannot Crit.

name: Magic Carpet
descText: Summon a Magic Carpet that will fly you away. While flying you are immune to slows and doing any action will dismiss the carpet. Cannot use abilities while the carpet is being summoned.

name: Mercurial Magnum
descText: Your imbued ability charges up over time with bonus spirit damage , bonus fire rate , and reloads bullets on use. Until your next reload, your bullets deal bonus spirit damage based on your Spirit Power.

name: Phantom Strike
descText: Teleport to an enemy target and pull them to the ground. Dealing damage , Move speed reduction and Disarm .

name: Plated Armor
descText: Gain a chance to either deflect incoming bullets, preventing all weapon damage or prevent all on-hit effects from bullets.

name: Refresher
descText: Reset the cooldown of all your abilities and restore all your charges .

name: Ricochet
descText: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

name: Scourge
descText: Apply Spirit Resist and an aura on a friendly target that deals damage to enemies proportional to their max health. Can be self cast.

name: Silencer
descText: Your bullets build up to a Silence . Victims are immune to the build up for 10s after silence expires.

name: Spellbreaker
descText: The next instance of high spirit damage you take is significantly reduced.

name: Spellslinger
descText: While in-combat whenever you cast an ability or item, gain a stacking buff that improves fire rate and reload speed. Each stack refreshes the duration.

name: Spirit Burn
descText: Dealing significant spirit damage to an enemy within 5s causes an explosion dealing damage and a burn to nearby enemies. While burning, enemies take damage over time and receive reduced healing. Deals half-damage and has half-cooldown on non-heroes.

name: Spiritual Overflow
descText: Gain bonus Fire Rate , Spirit Power and Spirit Lifesteal by charging up when shooting enemy heroes.

name: Transcendent Cooldown
descText: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities and items.

name: Unstoppable
descText: Temporarily suppress negative status effects and become immune to Stun, Silence, Sleep, Root, and Disarm . Cannot be used while Stunned or Slept .

name: Witchmail
descText: Taking heavy hits of spirit damage from an enemy reduces a random ability cooldown .

name: Apex Combat
descText: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

name: Celestial Blessing
descText: Applies an extremely powerful cleanse that replenishes your allies globally.

name: Cloak of Opportunity
descText: Block the next debuff that would apply movement lock, Stun, Chained, Immobilize, or Sleep and become Unstoppable . Also gain a Barrier and bonus move speed

name: Electric Slippers
descText: When sliding, evade bullets, gain fire rate and deal damage to enemies around you. Cooldown is per target.

name: Eternal Gift
descText: Periodically gain a random permanent stat buff.

name: Frostbite Charm
descText: Imbued ability has its Cooldown reduced and gains Spirit Power . When the ability deals damage, freeze the target and apply bonus damage . Cooldown is per target.

name: Haunting Scream
descText: Launch an expanding projectile which Curses enemies for a short duration.

name: Haunting Shot
descText: Your next bullet applies a powerful debuff reducing the enemy's damage output, healing and movement speed. It also deals bonus spirit damage based on the targets current Health. The bullet is larger and penetrates through targets.

name: Infinite Rounds
descText: You have infinite ammo.

name: Mystic Conduit
descText: Provides yourself and allies with a powerful spirit focused aura. Has reduced values on allies.

name: Mystical Piano
descText: After a short delay, enemies in the target area will be stunned and have their stamina depleted. After the stun they will be temporarily dazed.

name: Nullification Burst
descText: Removes any positive buffs and prevents stamina usage and healing effects on enemies.

name: Omnicharge Signet
descText: Imbue any active non-ultimate ability with Bonus Ability Charges . Already charged abilities receive more bonus charges.

name: Prism Blast
descText: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which lasers blast out and rotate around you.

name: Runed Gauntlets
descText: Everytime you land a heavy melee, your existing cooldowns get reduced.

name: Seraphim Wings
descText: When Airborne, You deal more damage and take reduced damage. Allows unlimited Air Dash and Jumping.

name: Shadow Step
descText: Teleport straight ahead.

name: Shadow Strike
descText: Go Invisible on Stamina use with no detection range. Doing a melee attack while invisible will cause you to steal bullet and spirit resistance from them and deal damage over time .

name: Shrink Ray
descText: Reduces Model Size and grants Move Speed to the target. Allows usage of tunnels in this mode. Can be self-cast.

name: Unstable Concoction
descText: Consume a concoction that grants you Unstoppable and increased speed, health, spirit and weapon damage . After a short duration you die and explode , stunning nearby enemies and dealing damage based on your maximum health. Dying this way reduces your respawn time by 50% .
